title: Vendor Record
description: Defines third-party AI supplier credentials, data policies, and active service integrations under supplier reviews.

id.description: Unique identifier of the vendor (e.g. vnd_1234).

name.description: Legal or operational name of the supplier.

description.description: Overview of services or tool APIs provided by this supplier.

contact_email.description: Primary email for compliance or support inquiries.

data_access_policy.description: Data privacy and retention rules of the supplier.

certifications.description: List of active security or audit certifications (e.g. ISO/IEC 27001, SOC 2 Type II).

status.description: Operational approval status of the supplier.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the vendor record was initialized.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the vendor record was last modified.

metadata.description: Custom key-value pairs for metadata extensions.
